title: How to build proactive agents & self-improving company (Fully explained)
summary: AI Jason presents a guide to building proactive agents and self-improving systems. The video covers proactive AI loops, autonomous agent design patterns including autonomous ads optimization and SEO, and highlights Loopany as an open-source framework that enables these capabilities through memory and tool integration.
